name: com.bci4kids.bciessentials
description: A set of front end components for streamlined development of BCI applications in Unity

samples.description: Simple example setup for a P300 paradigm with multiple selectable trial behaviours and a utility script to generate flashing cubes in a grid.
A more complex game demonstrating one possible configuration of an SSVEP paradigm. Depends on 2D tilemap and vector graphics packages.
Basic one button game implementing training for and live input from a BCI using Motor Imagery.
